creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
plugging in a USB WIFI dongle I got this; unclear if it was from this one or another one which got toggled down/up ...  fairly recent HEAD of sometime the last two weeks.  I thought these panics were gone ..

panic: starting DAD on non-tentative address 0xfffff80003990600
cpuid = 1
time = 1502195081
